info.title: il2cppinterop
info.description: CLI tool for generating managed proxy assemblies for Il2Cpp

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze deobfuscation performance with different parameter values. Will not generate assemblies.

options.name: --input
options.description: Directory of assemblies to deobfuscate

options.name: --add-prefix-to
options.description: Assemblies and namespaces starting with these will get an Il2Cpp prefix in generated assemblies. Allows multiple values. Obsolete.

options.name: --dont-add-prefix-to
options.description: Assemblies and namespaces starting with these will not get an Il2Cpp prefix in generated assemblies. Allows multiple values.

options.name: --use-opt-out-prefixing
options.description: Assemblies and namespaces will get an Il2Cpp prefix in generated assemblies unless otherwise specified. Obsolete.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a deobfuscation map from original unobfuscated assemblies. Will not generate assemblies.

options.name: --old-assemblies
options.description: Directory with old unobfuscated assemblies

options.name: --new-assemblies
options.description: Directory to write obfuscation maps to

options.name: --output
options.description: Directory to write obfuscation maps to

options.name: --include
options.description: Include these assemblies for deobfuscation map generation. If none are specified, all assemblies will be included.

options.name: --deobf-uniq-chars
options.description: How many characters per unique token to use during deobfuscation

options.name: --deobf-uniq-max
options.description: How many maximum unique tokens per type are allowed during deobfuscation

options.name: --obf-regex
options.description: Specifies a regex for obfuscated names. All types and members matching will be renamed.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate wrapper assemblies that can be used to interop with Il2Cpp

options.name: --input
options.description: Directory with Il2CppDumper's dummy assemblies

options.name: --output
options.description: Directory to write generated assemblies to

options.name: --unity
options.description: Directory with original Unity assemblies for unstripping

options.name: --game-assembly
options.description: Path to GameAssembly.dll. Used for certain analyses

options.name: --no-xref-cache
options.description: Don't generate xref scanning cache. All scanning will be done at runtime.

options.name: --add-prefix-to
options.description: Assemblies and namespaces starting with these will get an Il2Cpp prefix in generated assemblies. Allows multiple values. Obsolete.

options.name: --dont-add-prefix-to
options.description: Assemblies and namespaces starting with these will not get an Il2Cpp prefix in generated assemblies. Allows multiple values.

options.name: --use-opt-out-prefixing
options.description: Assemblies and namespaces will get an Il2Cpp prefix in generated assemblies unless otherwise specified. Obsolete.

options.name: --deobf-map
options.description: Specifies a file specifying deobfuscation map for obfuscated types and members.

options.name: --deobf-uniq-chars
options.description: How many characters per unique token to use during deobfuscation

options.name: --deobf-uniq-max
options.description: How many maximum unique tokens per type are allowed during deobfuscation

options.name: --blacklist-assembly
options.description: Don't write specified assembly to output. Allows multiple values.

options.name: --obf-regex
options.description: Specifies a regex for obfuscated names. All types and members matching will be renamed.

options.name: --passthrough-names
options.description: If specified, names will be copied from input assemblies as-is without renaming or deobfuscation.

options.name: --no-parallel
options.description: Disable parallel processing when writing assemblies. Use if you encounter stability issues when generating assemblies.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: wrapper-gen
commands.description: Tools for generating Il2Cpp struct wrappers from libi2lcpp source

options.name: --headers
options.description: Directory that contains libil2cpp headers. Directory must contains subdirectories named after libil2cpp version.

options.name: --output
options.description: Directory to write managed struct wrapper sources to

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Produce more verbose output

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
